final:
module RefModule(
	input clk,
	input rst,
	input up,
	input down,
	
	output reg [3:0] count
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            if (up && !down) begin
                count <= count + 1;
            end else if (!up && down) begin
                count <= count - 1;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
